creator: tz@freebsd.org
text:
Sadly this didn't fix the issue. The tester with the success-feedback just used an older git. -.- Another tester and myself still hit the issue. 

After more digging this is a little surprising. The bugfix was backported, but it doesn't seem to work. First "sure it really works" seems to be GitLab 8.15.

Since there seems to be no other problems with the update i will commit it and start work on the next version. That's a bad situation but since there are around 50 ports depending on git i fear a downgrade could break other things.
